F24 Words in rule 10.13 substituted (1.10.2020) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 2) Rules 2020 (S.I. 2020/758) , rules 1(1) , 3(2)(c)


### Power to adjourn the hearing for consideration of the penalty E+W


10.14. [ F25 The court ] may adjourn the hearing for consideration of the penalty to be imposed for any contempt of court found proved and such a hearing may be restored if the respondent does not comply with any conditions specified by the court.


( F26 ... )

F26 Words in rule 10.14 omitted (22.4.2014) by virtue of The Family Procedure (Amendment No.3) Rules 2013 (S.I. 2013/3204) , rules 1 , 39(b) (with rule 137 ); S.I. 2014/954 , art. 2


### Hospital orders or guardianship orders under the Mental Health Act 1983 E+W


10.15. —(1) Where the [ F27 court ] makes a hospital order under the Mental Health Act 1983 the court officer must—
